_instructions: Copy this file to config.json and fill in all required fields. Do NOT rename or delete this file.
_telegramBotToken: Get this from @BotFather on Telegram. Send /newbot, follow the prompts, copy the token it gives you.
_telegramChatId: Your personal Telegram chat ID. Open Telegram, send /start to @userinfobot, and copy the number it replies with.
_projectName: The name of your project or company. Appears in the recap header (e.g., 'My SaaS', 'Side Project', 'Acme Inc').
_checkSocialEngine: Set to true to include a summary of social posts sent today (Twitter, TikTok, etc.).
_checkPostiz: Set to true to include Postiz queue health (posts sent today, queued for tomorrow, any failures). Requires postizApiKey below.
_postizApiKey: Your Postiz API key. Required only if checkPostiz is true. Get it from Postiz → Settings → API Keys.
_checkRevenue: Set to true to include today's revenue or sales count in the recap. Requires revenueApiUrl below.
_revenueApiUrl: An API endpoint that returns your revenue or sales data. Required only if checkRevenue is true. Should return JSON with a 'total' or 'count' field.
_checkBuildLogs: Set to true to include automation and build log status. Agent checks for successful runs and any failures in cron/automation logs.
_tomorrowFocus: Your standing focus for tomorrow. Appears at the bottom of the recap. Leave blank to be prompted each evening. Example: 'Finish landing page copy'.
